# Real-world BMP fixtures — license attribution

Files prefixed `real-bmpsuite-*` come from [BMP Suite](https://entropymine.com/jason/bmpsuite/) by Jason Summers, licensed under the MIT License.


Files used in this corpus, with origin paths from BMP Suite v2.7:

| Local filename | BMP Suite path | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `real-bmpsuite-g-rgb24.bmp` | `g/rgb24.bmp` | Reference 24-bit BMP from third-party tooling |
| `real-bmpsuite-g-pal8gs.bmp` | `g/pal8gs.bmp` | 256-entry grayscale palette |
| `real-bmpsuite-g-rletopdown.bmp` | `b/rletopdown.bmp` | Top-down RLE8 (spec-violating but PIL-accepted) |
